zh.lifeSummary: 當William De Chetwynd I於1326年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾英格斯特時，他的父親Philip De Chetwynd31歲，母親Alice Grendon21歲。他於大約1350年與Matilda De Verdon結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1373年在他的家鄉享年47歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Chetwynd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Chatwin
meanings: English (Warwickshire and Staffordshire): habitational name from a place in Shropshire called Chetwynd, from the Old English personal name Ceatta + Old English (ge)wind ‘winding ascent’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William De Chetwynd I was born in 1326, in Ingestre, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Philip De Chetwynd, was 31 and his mother, Alice Grendon, was 21. He married Matilda De Verdon about 1350. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1373, in his hometown, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William De Chetwynd I est né en 1326, à Ingestre, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Philip De Chetwynd, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Alice Grendon, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Matilda De Verdon environ 1350. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1373, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William De Chetwynd I 1326 in Ingestre, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Philip De Chetwynd 31 und seine Mutter Alice Grendon 21. Er hat um 1350 Matilda De Verdon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1373 im Alter von 47 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William De Chetwynd I è nato il nel 1326 nel Ingestre, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Philip De Chetwynd, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Alice Grendon, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Matilda De Verdon circa 1350. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1373, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William De Chetwynd Iが1326年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアインジェストアで生まれた時，父Philip De Chetwyndは31歳，母Alice Grendonは21歳であった。約1350年にMatilda De Verdonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1373年に故郷で47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William De Chetwynd I(이)가 1326년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 잉스트르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Philip De Chetwynd(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Grendon(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1350년 Matilda De Verdon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1373년 그의 고향에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William De Chetwynd I nasceu em 1326, em Ingestre, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Philip De Chetwynd, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Alice Grendon, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda De Verdon aproximadamente 1350. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1373, em sua cidade natal, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William De Chetwynd I родился в 1326 г. в местности ингестр, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Philip De Chetwynd было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Alice Grendon, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda De Verdon около 1350 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1373 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William De Chetwynd I nació en 1326, en Ingestre, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Philip De Chetwynd, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Alice Grendon, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Matilda De Verdon aproximadamente 1350. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1373, en su pueblo, a la edad de 47 años.
